posts.text:
Joe Rogan REFUSES to name DESTINY as the person they're talking about in his convo with Konstantin 😳🚨

Destiny "How WEAK they are... HASAN does this as well... VOLDEMORT game... Even Konstantin challenging me"

Video

Joe Rogan brings up Destiny in his convo with Konstantin 👀🚨

Destiny "He was EMBARRASSED... HUMILIATED... CRIMINAL family... Actually have a CRITICAL conversation... CIRCLE JERK"

Video

Destiny advises Joe Rogan and Konstantin Kisin to stay in their comfy hugbox.

Video

He understands. He’s asking what in the last 30 years has stood still and not increased in “unprecedented” ways. 

You can disagree with him about immigration but his argument has meaning and he isn’t “pretending not to understand”

He’s saying “Make an argument about why immigration is bad that’s deeper than ‘there’s more than there used to be’”


Jake Rattlesnake (@jakerattlesnk)

Here we have a lib pretending not to understand that mass immigration at current rates into Western countries is u
piped.video/watch?v=zm1Ar5Hc…
lmaoooo @KonstantinKisin literally crying on @joerogan about how much I trashed him (on his own country's politics!!!) in a giant hugbox session is just unreal to me, these are grown men lmao

Critical support for @ShawnMcCreesh for actually asking real questions to the president instead of standing around and throwing softballs/meaningless questions at him. Would regain so much respect for media if everyone started acting like this. Also huge shoutout to @kaitlancollins for conducting challenging interviews as well!


Clash Report (@clashreport)

Reporter: You just suggested that Iran somehow got its hands on a Tomahawk and bombed its own elementary school on the first day of the war

LOL


Cenk Uygur (@cenkuygur)

Israel is getting hit pretty badly right now. They're not talking about it since they don't want anyone thinking the war is going poorly. But soon they'll switch to victim mode. You'll see all over your TV, "Poor, poor Israel is being attacked by evil Iran." Um, they started it.



— https://nitter.net/cenkuygur/status/2031536507094536338#m

If college degrees are dying, someone forgot to tell the job market.

Video

She doesn’t get paid out of that fund, though, she gets paid out of the LLC as a 1099 contractor. It’s okay that she takes dark money, I just wish she (and people like you) were honest about it. 😞


Benjamin Ryan (@benryanwriter)

The Taylor Lorenz Brouhaha Over "Dark Money" Is Pretty Stupid

There’s been a lot of talk that internet-culture reporter and content creator Taylor Lorenz supposedly took “dark money” from a billionaire through the Omidyar journalism fellowship. (She received $50,000 f

"Brutal takedown"

if you want to chat, I'm always open to chat. I don't do 30 second video clips and I don't do 2 minute video responses. There's a reason why everyone in your corner is too afraid to engage.


hoe_math = PsychoMath (@ItIsHoeMath)

Destiny's response to my brutal takedown of his faux-intellectual joke of a career was "you are stupid," but in 50 words. 

Exactly what we should expect from leftoid midwits.



— https://nitter.net/ItIsHoeMath/status/2031560418825744823#m
Me when I can’t read court documents and also me when I’m so asspained about my life that I have to constantly slander the guy I’m skinwalking who introduced me to streaming. (:

I hate how deeply unserious online discourse has gotten. I guess we can see MAGA paying the price now with the midterms coming up, but man what a horrible few years it’s been watching a bunch of 90 IQ people convincing a bunch of 70 IQ people that they’re geniuses.


hoe_math = PsychoMath (@ItIsHoeMath)

I try not to talk about Destiny because he's too disgusting and stupid, but you should watch this clip of him.

He is refusing to accept the obvious definition of one word in one sentence inside

Taylor did NOT want to answer this question 😬😬

Video

"Here is my baseless opinion expressed with 100% metaphysical certitude"



Konstantin Kisin (@KonstantinKisin)

I am glad everyone is 100% sure that the war in Iran is the end of the world/a genius move/the end of the American Empire/the begining of a new age of American greatness/insert other opinion here.

But could you just acknowledge for a moment that you don't actually know how this is going to go because no one does? It's a gamble which could go either way. And all I see is people doing

BREAKING:  Leaked Texts seem to show that far-right MAGA influencer Jake Lang, 31 was texting a man pretending to be a 15-year-old girl on Instagram.  

Read the alleged texts below.  

Why the hell are the people who shout and scream the most, calling everyone else pedos, the ones who seem to be the disgusting ones?

The entire country could get shut down under Trump and MAGA will still somehow blame Biden??

Video

The pro-life argument always collapses into “but look at it though.”

Video
I feel like this would be a good stream game :)
Your Story Is A LIE - Destiny Confronts Leftist Journalist
Trump's Spiraling Oil Crisis
Destiny & MrMouton Attempt to Solve Veritasium's Weird Puzzle
Taylor Lorenz is STILL Lying about Chorus
Investigating RFK Jr's Bizarre "Food Pyramid"....
"Let Me Get This Straight, You Think Prosecuting Republicans is Realistic?"
YOU ARE RADICALIZING THEM! | Destiny Gets Confronted by his Head Mod Over His Rhetoric
TRUMP HAS NO PLAN
They Finally Debated... And It Quickly Became A Screaming Match
let's save democracy.
